inputs.label: Pulley 1 Diameter
inputs.businessContext: Diameter of the driving pulley. Determines belt speed and torque transmission. Based on standard pulley sizes (ISO 1082).

inputs.label: Pulley 2 Diameter
inputs.businessContext: Diameter of the driven pulley. Affects speed ratio and belt length. Standard pulley sizes per ISO 1082.

inputs.label: Center Distance
inputs.businessContext: Distance between pulley centers. Critical for belt length calculation and tension. Typically 1.5-3 times larger pulley diameter.

inputs.label: Pulley 1 Speed
inputs.businessContext: Rotational speed of driving pulley. Determines belt linear speed. Common motor speeds: 900, 1500, 3000 RPM.

inputs.label: Belt Type
inputs.businessContext: Type of belt affects tension, efficiency, and application. V-belts common in industrial drives; timing belts for synchronous motion.

rules: beltType must be one of: V-belt, Timing belt, Flat belt, Round belt

thresholds.beltSpeed: beltSpeed > 30 m/s -> warning: High belt speed may cause excessive wear and safety risk
thresholds.speedRatio: speedRatio > 6 -> warning: High speed ratio may require special belt or multiple stages

formulas.beltLength: 2 * centerDistance + Math.PI * (pulley1Diameter + pulley2Diameter) / 2 + Math.pow(pulley2Diameter - pulley1Diameter, 2) / (4 * centerDistance)

breakdown.beltSpeed: Linear speed of belt in m/s
breakdown.pulley2Speed: Rotational speed of driven pulley in RPM
breakdown.wrapAngle1: Wrap angle on pulley 1 in degrees
breakdown.wrapAngle2: Wrap angle on pulley 2 in degrees

hiddenLossDrivers: beltSpeed > 30 m/s -> High speed may cause vibration and reduced belt life
wrapAngle1 < 120 degrees -> Insufficient wrap may cause slippage
suggestedActions: If beltSpeed > 30 m/s, consider using a larger pulley or reducing motor speed
If wrapAngle1 < 120 degrees, increase center distance or use an idler pulley
If speedRatio > 6, consider a two-stage drive system
outputs.dataConfidenceAdjusted: beltSpeed * (1 - 0.05) // Assuming 5% uncertainty in input measurements

premiumFeatures: Detailed report with tension and power calculations
